channel.title: SevenAtSevenPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: President Trump tells Netflix to fire Susan Rice or 'pay consequences'
item.description: Trump demands Netflix fire board member Susan Rice or "pay the consequences" after she warned corporations not to expect Democratic forgiveness for th...

item.title: TSA says PreCheck is still operational, right after DHS head Kristi Noem said it was suspended due to government shutdown
item.description: It was not immediately clear whether Global Entry, another airport service, would be affected.

item.title: The Hypocrisy of Jon Meacham
item.description: His warning of a great ‘moral crisis’ ignores his own divisive rhetoric.

item.title: U.S. says ambassador's comments on Israel and the Middle East were taken out of context
item.description: An uproar continued Sunday after the U.S. ambassador to Israel, Mike Huckabee, said Israel has a right to much of the Middle East, as more Arab and Mu...

item.title: Populism Is Having a Moment in Australia
item.description: Will it last? Only if the country’s One Nation party can avoid the pitfalls experienced by other populist parties.

item.title: AOC blames critics, Trump after Munich hiccup backlash
item.description: AOC faces viral criticism after stumbling over Taiwan defense question, with fiancé's snoring heard during her lengthy Instagram response to critics.

item.title: Greenland rejects Trump's hospital ship proposal citing existing free healthcare system
item.description: Greenland's prime minister rejects Trump's hospital ship offer, saying the territory has free healthcare unlike America where "it costs money to go to...

item.title: ‘So Proud To Be Americans’: U.S. Men’s Hockey Team Defeats Canada In Overtime Battle For Olympic Gold
item.description: The U.S. men's national hockey team defeated Canada to earn Olympic gold, on the 46th anniversary of the 'Miracle on Ice.'

item.title: A two-child household must earn $400,000 a year for childcare to be affordable, study says. ‘It’s easy to see why birth rates are falling’
item.description: “Most parents could tell you that child care costs are astronomical these days and can cause a major financial burden, even for high-income families."

item.title: Why keeping lawmakers in DC during shutdown may have caused more harm than good
item.description: Congress left Washington without resolving DHS funding crisis because no deal was close, avoiding potential mayhem from keeping lawmakers idle during ...

item.title: Hoping for a tariff refund? Trump officials say they are waiting for lower courts to provide instructions. ‘They created the situation’
item.description: "I'm not going to get out ahead of the court. We will follow the court's direction. But as I said that could be weeks or months away.

item.title: Armed man shot and killed after ‘unauthorized entry’ into Mar-a-Lago: Secret Service
item.description: A man was fatally shot after allegedly making an "unauthorized entry" at Mar-a-Lago while carrying what appeared to be a shotgun and fuel can.

item.title: How Trump’s ‘Prior Authorization’ Deal Puts Patients Ahead of Paperwork
item.description: Speeding up insurers’ authorization process will deliver care more quickly and cut down on unnecessary red tape.

item.title: Everything I Learned About Show Biz Came from The Muppet Show
item.description: The 1976–1981 phase of the show remains wonderful entertainment for the whole family.

item.title: Don’t Prosecute Women for Abortion
item.description: While defending unborn children is essential, criminalizing women who have abortions is no way to show compassion.

item.title: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent: Tariff revenue projections 'unchanged' after SCOTUS ruling
item.description: The U.S. is not projecting any changes to the tariff revenue it will take this year as President Trump is reissuing tariffs the Supreme Court struck d...

item.title: Homeland Security suspends Global Entry, allows TSA PreCheck to remain operational for now
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security has suspended Global Entry and may do the same for TSA PreCheck if the shutdown of the department continues.

item.title: Trump un-endorses Rep. Jeff Hurd over opposition to tariffs, backs GOP primary challenger
item.description: President Trump has withdrawn his endorsement of Rep. Jeff Hurd over the Colorado Republican's opposition to his tariff policy, and is now backing his...

item.title: Trump says he's sending U.S. hospital ship to Greenland; local officials say, 'No thanks'
item.description: President Trump said he plans to send a U.S. hospital ship to Greenland, a semi-autonomous Danish territory that he wants to acquire, so its medical s...

item.title: Older adults are heading back to school and represent the ‘new majority student’ as they seek up-skilling or a career change
item.description: “I think this is tied to access. Many of our learners, not all of them, haven’t imagined themselves in any kind of higher education, post-secondary ed...

item.title: Top EU lawmaker proposes pause on U.S. trade deal ratification, citing ‘pure tariff chaos’ from Trump administration
item.description: “No one can make sense of it anymore — only open questions and growing uncertainty for the EU and other U.S. trading partners.”

item.title: Kavanaugh: Trump Obviously Has Tariff Power And Here’s How He Can Keep Using It
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court may have ruled against President Trump’s use of an emergency economics law to impose tariffs on foreign countries, but that doe...

item.title: 4 Of The Best Lines From Kavanaugh’s Masterclass Defense Of Trump’s Tariff Power
item.description: 'As they interpret the statute, the President could, for example, block all imports from China but cannot order even a $1 tariff on goods imported fro...

item.title: America Slides Into A Congress-Shaped Hole, And Gorsuch Helps
item.description: Our discussion, in media and in law, has been about Trump's excesses and boundary-crossing. A better starting place would be the laziness and uselessn...

item.title: CIA Yanks 19 Docs ‘Compromised’ By Leftist Activism, Including Threat Assessment Targeting ‘Traditional Motherhood’
item.description: The CIA’s commitment to advancing leftist activism appears to span at least three presidential administrations beginning in 2015.

item.title: Why Static Portfolios Fail When Risk Regimes Change
item.description: Why static portfolio frameworks fail when risk regimes shift, drawing lessons from the very different market breakdowns of 2020 and 2022. The post Why...

item.title: What the Market Knows That WACC Doesn’t
item.description: Market-implied discount rates reveal how investors price risk, often diverging from WACC and reshaping capital decisions. The post What the Market Kno...

item.title: Attention Bias in AI-Driven Investing
item.description: AI tools may favor popular stocks over overlooked ones, embedding attention bias into investment decisions. The post Attention Bias in AI-Driven Inves...

item.title: Social Security Claiming Strategies for High-Net-Worth Clients
item.description: Social Security claiming is a capital-allocation decision for affluent clients. This analysis weighs taxes, longevity risk, and liquidity trade-offs. ...

item.title: Evolving Your Wealth Management Practice for 2026 and Beyond
item.description: Wealth management’s 2026 outlook: growth will hinge on transparency, integration, and relevance to women and next-generation investors. The post Evolv...
